subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of Names and Creator of Heaven! Thou seest me within the talons of Thine enemies who have violated the Covenant [3.5s]... ...O Lord, Thou seest the tears of mine eyes and Thou hearest the sorrow in my heart's lamentation. I beseech Thee, O Thou Lord Eternal
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک الاسماء و فاطر السماء ترانی بین مخالب اعدائک الذین نقضوا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for forgiveness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
